title: Egoless Awareness
definition: The realization of one's true nature as an egoless, interconnected awareness that transcends individual identity.

difficulty_levels.beginner: It's like realizing you are not just your thoughts and feelings but part of a larger whole, beyond the limited self-image we usually have.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: A state of consciousness where the separate 'I' dissolves into an all-encompassing, interconnected awareness that transcends personal identity.
difficulty_levels.expert: The philosophical insight that our true nature is not limited to the ego and its desires but extends to an infinite, interconnected awareness, beyond the duality of self and other.

extra_fields.insight: The realization that one's true nature transcends individual identity.
